textByHashes.061566915e672f5a3b7007278166a4c3a1209131: Hello there. I'd love to stop and chat, but I'm afraid I have some important work to get done.
textByHashes.1c5bdaca98e5d6a6585d6feef364ddc78ae93275: I have it right here, sir.
textByHashes.eef6c947dd9caea56018ec5b546932d2fcc224e1: Ah, hello, . It's a pleasure to be working with you. Your exploits are, of course, legendary.
textByHashes.b7260e15d48a0201a75320ddd26a51efa0a4bcbe: What? I won't talk... You can't make me!
textByHashes.a086be460e90bb1b8e068a5de589c49e66c3629c: Sorry, but I've no idea. They roughed me up quite a bit... I'm struggling to think straight.
textByHashes.e4b2714d0838ac80d5e3ef4ecd5727b32dcf47a8: I wish I could help, but they roughed me up quite a bit... I'm struggling to think straight.
textByHashes.df34993cd2a6627a9027b824bc6e2b80730bf781: I'm very weak... I can barely move...
textByHashes.4b779de89249bfcedaf286d0df0785ee96d818ee: Not much better... I can still barely move...
textByHashes.48c4de850cb436ad5adcae044ea5a7be4756268a: Thank you, . However, this is quite embarrassing... but I don't think I have the strength to take them myself.
textByHashes.a350d8a42917dcb26d1a600e1ab98f43fdeb1de7: Thank you, friend. I really needed that.
textByHashes.0d7290ed1385d41e0a4ee928da1a4f63f85c51f9: Not yet. My mission isn't complete.
textByHashes.d644c598beec29ff457eece3419060aab1a985ff: Then how about a compromise? My job was to find the Dark Squall and gather any intelligence available.
textByHashes.3b16d86fc443fb67a5f43cf13088803afcfd1e91: If you can get me into the inner section of this place, I can memorise any intelligence and then get back to Falador, leaving the Dark Squall for you to handle.
textByHashes.d084aafb9896214a3d026aa88b9fecfe8c021fc3: Thank you, . I see you managed to find yourself a disguise to use. For this to work, I'll need one as well.
textByHashes.bf9d07f1c0e08c267657977297bc259bb5f2b5f2: Excellent! Now, excuse me for a moment...
textByHashes.b3c31598ee74511e66c1eea4e0f4548bfcb74086: Right, shall we get to it?
textByHashes.8aa8d09396a743e336cdf3ab44a60b514d28ad59: Very well. I'm right behind you.
textByHashes.d13ca467f2bafe1d0d648dd30f9a34643dfbfbd0: Very well, but don't take too long.
textByHashes.b72d082f6372ac04bca2ecd2a3c64587b06d8dfc: Thank you, friend. I'm feeling a bit better already.
textByHashes.5fabb21ead9f0877d8a83c89a76181c4564c1bc7: Hello again, . Any luck finding that disguise?
textByHashes.f0f863f8596197d3fea48b576270975ca378a6b9: I'll wait here until you find something suitable.
textByHashes.413ea09a2a01bced5c882e471445dbb7a06867da: We need to get into the inner section of this place. I'll follow your lead.
textByHashes.1df264dae78bbdb3ffffd5049f813c51ac5c4928: This is where we want to be! Let's see if we can find some sort of intelligence. Maybe some maps or similar.
textByHashes.07a6a458e568a52d1f738f2c926a22a78c1c32e2: Ah, this looks perfect. I'll stay here and study these maps while you deal with the Dark Squall.
textByHashes.4eb6c91f0f451ecb910f0107bcd9286df55a981b: Indeed. Remember how you apprehended that spy earlier? I think the same sort of thing should work perfectly here.
textByHashes.e3bdb0610022c2521fe7ef42646c4a00ed0df561: I managed to keep a teleorb hidden when I was captured. If you can plant it on the Dark Squall, we can teleport him to Falador!
textByHashes.28342e197c2add9eeed01b0b8a2fc0cbcd3b30c1: Have you managed to plant that teleorb on the Dark Squall yet?
textByHashes.18416532b1f7a7b21496adf13dc8a3bd86be6f6b: He must be somewhere nearby. Get it planted on him and then get yourself back to Falador.
textByHashes.7cf5792bf46b67f2120dbe45d19a81d3fdd6d40a: Hello there, friend. Thanks for your help back at the Black Knight Catacombs. I'd probably still be locked in that cell if it wasn't for you.
textByHashes.aee8b02607185adf8a1dfdcdce252913576a730e: Some of the plans I found detailed a remote location on the western edge of the Wilderness. I reckon that's Lucien's base of operations.
textByHashes.eaa06d6c58733c790e683709c2b7421bbe59bdc9: It seems the enemy has their own form of teleorb, similar to the ones we use ourselves. I found details suggesting that the Dark Squall, or Surok I should say, was in possession of one.
textByHashes.8fd92130bdce57b7cc8d476e0366a0cdd7d7c86d: I'd recommend you keep that disguise on. It should let you get nice and close to Lucien without being spotted.
textByHashes.2a7395df3bd40c5329a06edfa1946577806f0c82: I'd recommend disguising yourself again before you do so. That should let you get nice and close to Lucien without being spotted.
textByHashes.adf288c5509f9d5b66444cdd4b62ad04af166084: Hello there, friend. I heard what happened with Lucien and the Stone. Don't worry, he'll pay for his crimes sooner or later.
textByHashes.235f44e496855236ced3ae4d22e97fde72f217f1: Have faith, friend. Evil never prospers for long.
textByHashes.afb0f5d885298faeeec60256838443a674660555: Not to worry. I have them here for you.
